Package com.example.codebase

package com.example.codebase
  • Class
    Description
    AppCache
    Simple singleton memory cache for profile and event data.
    AppDatabase
    Singleton database management class for Firebase Firestore.
    AppNotification
    Represents a lottery notification stored in Firestore.
    BrowseEventsActivity
    Entrant browse events screen.
    CancelledEntrantsActivity
    CancelledEntrantsActivity — US 02.06.02 Displays all cancelled entrants for a given event, split across three tabs: All — the full cancelledEntrants array from Firestore Declined — entrants who actively declined their invitation: cancelledEntrants ∩ (selectedEntrants - enrolledEntrants) Cancelled — entrants removed by the organizer: cancelledEntrants - declined
    CancelledEntrantsActivity.CancelledEntrant
    Lightweight model representing a single cancelled entrant row.
    CancelledEntrantsAdapter
    CancelledEntrantsAdapter — RecyclerView adapter for the Cancelled Entrants screen.
    CreateEventActivity
    Activity for creating or editing an event using a multi-step wizard interface.
    CreateEventFragment
    Fragment for the first step ("Basics") of the create-event wizard.
    CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher
    A convenience
    invalid reference 
    TextWatcher
    adapter that provides no-op implementations of CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher.beforeTextChanged(java.lang.CharSequence, int, int, int) and CreateEventFragment.SimpleTextWatcher.afterTextChanged(Editable), allowing subclasses to override only
    invalid reference 
    #onTextChanged
    when that is the only callback needed.
    CreateEventViewModel
    ViewModel that holds all user-entered state across the four steps of the create/edit event wizard (CreateEventActivity).
    CreateQrFragment
    Fragment for the final step ("Created") of the create-event wizard.
    CreateScheduleFragment
    A Fragment that provides the UI for configuring event and registration schedule details during the event creation flow.
    CreateSettingsFragment
    A Fragment that provides the UI for configuring optional event settings during the event creation flow.
    DeviceIdManager
    Manages the unique device identifier for the application.
    Entrant
    Represents an entrant in the event lottery system.
    EntrantEventDetailActivity
    Displays the full details of an event from an entrant's perspective and provides actions to join/leave the waiting list or drop out of an accepted invitation.
    Event
    Domain model representing a lottery event in the Timely system.
    EventAdapter
    RecyclerView.Adapter for displaying a list of Event objects.
    EventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Listener interface for item-tap events on the event list.
    EventDetailActivity
    Event detail screen for the organizer role.
    EventDetailsActivity
    Displays read-only details for a selected event.
    EventPoster
    Represents an event poster image stored in a Base64-encoded format.
    EventRepository
    Repository class responsible for loading Event data from Firestore.
    EventRepository.EventDetailsCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a single Event.
    EventRepository.EventsCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a collection of Event objects.
    EventSchema
    Utility class providing Firestore schema normalization helpers for Event documents.
    EventsFragment
    A Fragment that displays a browsable list of all active events available to entrants.
    ExploreEventAdapter
    A RecyclerView.Adapter for ExplorePageActivity that displays a list of event invitations to an Entrant and surfaces accept, decline, and detail-view actions to the hosting component.
    ExploreEventAdapter.OnInvitationActionListener
    Callback interface for delivering invitation interaction events to the hosting
    invalid reference 
    android.app.Activity
    or Fragment.
    ExplorePageActivity
    Displays all available events and a summary card for pending lottery invitations.
    FinalEntrantListAdapter
    invalid reference 
    ArrayAdapter
    that displays a list of entrants identified by device ID, resolving each device ID to a name and email via an asynchronous Firestore lookup.
    FinalEntrantListFragment
    A Fragment that displays the final enrolled entrant list for an Event, along with a capacity progress indicator and a searchable list view.
    FirstFragment
    The first screen in the app's navigation graph.
    HistoryFragment
    A Fragment that will display the user's event history.
    HomeFragment
    HomeFragment represents the main or default screen of the application.
    InvitationFragment
    A Fragment that presents a lottery invitation to an Entrant, allowing them to accept or decline their selected spot in an Event.
    Invitations
    Controller class to manage Entrant invitations locally.
    InvitationsActivity
    Displays the list of lottery invitations for the current device's entrant.
    InvitedEntrantsActivity
    Displays all selected entrants for an event, split across four tabs: All, Pending, Accepted, and Declined.
    InvitedEntrantsActivity.InvitedEntrant
    Lightweight model representing a single selected entrant and their current invitation status.
    InvitedEntrantsAdapter
    RecyclerView.Adapter for the Invited Entrants screen.
    InvitedEntrantsAdapter.CancelListener
    Callback interface implemented by the host activity to handle cancel requests initiated from this adapter.
    MainActivity
    Temporary home screen providing quick access to entrant user stories.
    MyApp
    The application-level class for the Timely app, serving as the entry point for global initialization logic.
    NotificationListAdapter
    Adapter used to populate a list of notifications in a ListView.
    NotificationsActivity
    Displays the current device's notifications and pending event invitations.
    OrganizerActivity
    "My Events" screen for the organizer role.
    OrganizerEventAdapter
    RecyclerView.Adapter for the organizer's "My Events" screen.
    OrganizerEventAdapter.OnEventClickListener
    Listener interface for item-tap events on the event list.
    ProfileActivity
    Displays a summary of the current user's profile and provides navigation to profile editing and role switching.
    ProfileFragment
    A Fragment that displays the current user's profile information and provides a shortcut to edit it.
    ProfileSettingsActivity
    Activity for creating or updating a user's profile information.
    QrDisplayActivity
    Generates and displays a QR code for a specific event, and allows the user to share the QR code image via the Android share sheet.
    QRScannerActivity
    An AppCompatActivity that provides a live camera preview for scanning QR codes associated with events.
    RoleCheckActivity
    Invisible entry point activity, registered as MAIN/LAUNCHER.
    SecondFragment
    The second screen in the app's navigation graph.
    SelectedNotificationChecker
    Utility class that reads unread notifications from Firestore for the current device and posts them as local Android notifications.
    SendNotificationFragment
    Bottom sheet dialog that allows an organizer to compose and send notifications to a selected group of event entrants.
    SplashActivity
    The initial activity shown to the user on application launch.
    User
    Represents a user in the Timely Event Lottery System.
    UserRepository
    Repository class responsible for Firestore user profile operations.
    UserRepository.ErrorCallback
    Callback interface for operations that only need to report failure.
    UserRepository.UserCallback
    Callback interface for operations that return a single User.
    WelcomeActivity
    Role selection screen displayed on every application launch.
    WizardPagerAdapter
    FragmentStateAdapter that drives the event-creation wizard's ViewPager2.
